title: System Governance/System Governance - *.md spoke runtime body-structure contract
description: Hook-consumable runtime artifact for System Governance/ spoke files (one per pillar). Migration target for the SG_MAX_LINES hardcode previously at hooks/pre-write-guard.sh:275-326 per Plan 81 SP13 Session 9 T-21. Authored by SP14 Batch A T-13.9 (2026-05-18); R-37 lockstep with T-17 hook migration.
design_source: SP13 Session 9 T-21 (VA_MAX_LINES → SG_MAX_LINES migration target) + Session 7 L-89 (universal Vault Architecture → System Governance rename)

_design_notes.consumer: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh (size-cap guard at lines 275-326 — reads .file_type_contracts."System Governance.md.json".size_limits.max_lines from foundation-master bundle; fallback to 400)
_design_notes.lockstep_pair: hooks/pre-write-guard.sh size-guard block (R-37 atomic lockstep — T-13.9 + T-17 same-commit per SP14 Batch A discipline) + governance/_index.json pillar 6 file-type-contracts registry
_design_notes.evolution_protocol: R-37 atomic lockstep — runtime artifact + hook consumer + foundation-master bundle composition updated in one commit

size_limits.rationale: Navigational-index threshold migrated from hooks/pre-write-guard.sh hardcode per SP13 Session 9 T-21. Spokes are the hub navigation; long content extracts to deeper spokes or sub-files.

mirrors_pillar_rationale: Each spoke mirrors exactly one of the 8 foundation governance pillars (canonical §D pattern); R-37 lockstep couples spoke <-> pillar JSON <-> _index.json registry.
